kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Insert Into List
kw.doc: Inserts ``value`` into ``list`` to the position specified with ``index``.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.arg: msg=Robot Framework remote server binary not found (${DIRECTORY}/${BINARY_NAME}). Did you forget to build it in ${CONFIGURATION} configuration?
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

branch.condition: not ${SKIP_RUNNING_SERVER} and not ${SERVER_REMOTE_DEBUG} and not '${SYSTEM}' == 'Windows' and not ${NET_PLATFORM}

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

branch.condition: not ${SKIP_RUNNING_SERVER} and ${SERVER_REMOTE_DEBUG} and not '${SYSTEM}' == 'Windows' and not ${NET_PLATFORM}

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: Windows doesn't support server remote debug option.
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Import Library
kw.doc: Imports a library with the given name and optional arguments.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Convert To Lower Case
kw.doc: Converts string to lower case.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Replace String Using Regexp
kw.doc: Replaces ``pattern`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Join Path
kw.doc: Joins the given path part(s) to the given base path.

test.name: Should Boot Successfully and Interaction with REPL

kw.name: Wait For Line On Uart
kw.msg: Return: {'Line': 'MicroPython started on Tang Nano 4K', 'Timestamp': 0.129, 'Groups': [], 'IsFailingString': False}

kw.name: Terminate Process
kw.doc: Stops the process gracefully or forcefully.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Set Test Message
kw.doc: Sets message for the current test case.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Timeout Occurred
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword if either a test or a keyword timeout has occurred.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.arg: Couldn't load the Dialogs library - interactive debugging is not possible
Test failed. Press OK once done debugging.
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.name: Verify FPGA DMA Implementation

kw.name: Wait For Line On Uart
kw.msg: Return: {'Line': 'MicroPython started on Tang Nano 4K', 'Timestamp': 0.129, 'Groups': [], 'IsFailingString': False}

kw.name: Wait For Line On Uart
kw.msg:
InvalidOperationException: Terminal tester failed!
Full report: ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 0] Attached to UART event: success) [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 0] [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 0] MicroPython started on Tang Nano 4K ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 12.2] Line containing >>MicroPython started on Tang Nano 4K<< event: success) [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 0] Tang Nano 4K with GW1NSR-LV4C [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 0] MicroPython c3ca843493 on 2026-03-25; Tang Nano 4K with GW1NSR-LV4C >>> import machine [[no newline]] ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 13.068] Line containing >>import machine<< event: success) [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 13] >>> dma = machine.FPGADMA() [[no newline]] ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 13.8] Line containing >>dma = machine.FPGADMA()<< event: success) [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 13] >>> src = bytearray([0x11, 0x22, 0x33, 0x44, 0x55, 0x66, 0x77, 0x88]) [[no newline]] ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 15.707] Line containing >>src = bytearray([0x11, 0x22, 0x33, 0x44, 0x55, 0x66, 0x77, 0x88])<< event: success) [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 15] >>> dst = bytearray(8) [[no newline]] ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 19.376] Line containing >>dst = bytearray(8)<< event: success) [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 19] >>> print('DM' + 'A_START') [[no newline]] ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 21] Line containing >>print('DM' + 'A_START')<< event: success) [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 21] [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 22] DMA_START ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 22.6] Line containing >>DMA_START<< event: success) >>> dma.transfer(src, 0x10000000, 8) [[no newline]] ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 23.238] Line containing >>dma.transfer(src, 0x10000000, 8)<< event: success) [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 23] >>> dma.transfer(0x10000000, dst, 8) [[no newline]] ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 25.3] Line containing >>dma.transfer(0x10000000, dst, 8)<< event: success) [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 25] >>> if src == dst: print('DM' + 'A_OK') [[no newline]] ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 27.3] Line containing >>if src == dst: print('DM' + 'A_OK')<< event: success) [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 27] ... [[no newline]] ([host: 03/25/2026 11:07:02, virt: 8027.8] Line containing >>DMA_OK<< event: failure) --- Current line buffer contains 4 characters: >>... <<

InvalidOperationException: at Antmicro.Renode.RobotFramework.UartKeywords.OperationFail(TerminalTester tester) at Antmicro.Renode.RobotFramework.UartKeywords.DoTest[T](Nullable`1 timeout, Nullable`1 testerId, Func`3 test, Boolean expectBinaryModeTester) at Antmicro.Renode.RobotFramework.UartKeywords.WaitForLineOnUart(String content, Nullable`1 timeout, Nullable`1 testerId, Boolean treatAsRegex, Boolean includeUnfinishedLine, Nullable`1 pauseEmulation, Nullable`1 matchNextLine) at InvokeStub_UartKeywords.WaitForLineOnUart(Object, Span`1) at System.Reflection.MethodBaseInvoker.InvokeWithManyArgs(Object obj, BindingFlags invokeAttr, Binder binder, Object[] parameters, CultureInfo culture)

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Match Regexp
kw.doc: Fails if ``string`` does not match ``pattern`` as a regular expression.

kw.msg:
Arguments: [ "InvalidOperationException: Terminal tester failed!

Full report:
([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 0] Attached to UART event: success)
[host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 0] 
[host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 0] MicroPython started on Tang Nano 4K
([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 12.2] Line containing >>MicroPython started on Tang Nano 4K<< event: success)
[host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 0] Tang Nano 4K with GW1NSR-LV4C
[host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 0] MicroPython c3ca843493 on 2026-03-25; Tang Nano 4K with GW1NSR-LV4C
>>> import machine [[no newline]]
([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 13.068] Line containing >>import machine<< event: success)
[host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 13] 
>>> dma = machine.FPGADMA() [[no newline]]
([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 13.8] Line containing >>dma = machine.FPGADMA()<< event: success)
[host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 13] 
>>> src = bytearray([0x11, 0x22, 0x33, 0x44, 0x55, 0x66, 0x77, 0x88]) [[no ...
 [ Message content over the limit has been removed. ]
[host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 22] DMA_START
([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 22.6] Line containing >>DMA_START<< event: success)
>>> dma.transfer(src, 0x10000000, 8) [[no newline]]
([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 23.238] Line containing >>dma.transfer(src, 0x10000000, 8)<< event: success)
[host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 23] 
>>> dma.transfer(0x10000000, dst, 8) [[no newline]]
([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 25.3] Line containing >>dma.transfer(0x10000000, dst, 8)<< event: success)
[host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 25] 
>>> if src == dst: print('DM' + 'A_OK') [[no newline]]
([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 27.3] Line containing >>if src == dst: print('DM' + 'A_OK')<< event: success)
[host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 27] 
... [[no newline]]
([host: 03/25/2026 11:07:02, virt: 8027.8] Line containing >>DMA_OK<< event: failure)

kw.doc: Sets message for the current test case.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Timeout Occurred
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword if either a test or a keyword timeout has occurred.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Get Variable Value
kw.doc: Returns variable value or ``default`` if the variable does not exist.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Replace String Using Regexp
kw.doc: Replaces ``pattern`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Get Variable Value
kw.doc: Returns variable value or ``default`` if the variable does not exist.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Replace String Using Regexp
kw.doc: Replaces ``pattern`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.arg: Couldn't load the Dialogs library - interactive debugging is not possible
Test failed. Press OK once done debugging.
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.status:
InvalidOperationException: Terminal tester failed!

[ Message content over the limit has been removed. ] [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 22] DMA_START ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 22.6] Line containing >>DMA_START<< event: success) >>> dma.transfer(src, 0x10000000, 8) [[no newline]] ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 23.238] Line containing >>dma.transfer(src, 0x10000000, 8)<< event: success) [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 23] >>> dma.transfer(0x10000000, dst, 8) [[no newline]] ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 25.3] Line containing >>dma.transfer(0x10000000, dst, 8)<< event: success) [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 25] >>> if src == dst: print('DM' + 'A_OK') [[no newline]] ([host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 27.3] Line containing >>if src == dst: print('DM' + 'A_OK')<< event: success) [host: 03/25/2026 11:06:36, virt: 27] ... [[no newline]] ([host: 03/25/2026 11:07:02, virt: 8027.8] Line containing >>DMA_OK<< event: failure) --- Current line buffer contains 4 characters: >>... <<

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.msg: Process configuration: cwd: /app shell: False stdout: /app/PIPE stderr: /app/PIPE stdin: None alias: None env: None
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Arguments: [ 'Running tests in /app/src/lib/micropython/tests...\nSome tests failed. Check COMPLIANCE_TESTS.md for details.' ]
Running tests in /app/src/lib/micropython/tests... Some tests failed. Check COMPLIANCE_TESTS.md for details.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Terminate Process
kw.doc: Stops the process gracefully or forcefully.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Set Test Message
kw.doc: Sets message for the current test case.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Timeout Occurred
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword if either a test or a keyword timeout has occurred.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.arg: Couldn't load the Dialogs library - interactive debugging is not possible
Test failed. Press OK once done debugging.
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Wait For Process
kw.doc: Waits for the process to complete or to reach the given timeout.
